issue_title: torch.logdet produces incorrect results for singular matrices on CUDA vs CPU
surface_reasoning: Priority 1: labeled `module: correctness (silent)` + `module: cuda` + `module: linear algebra` + `high priority`. Title: `torch.logdet` produces incorrect results for singular matrices on CUDA vs CPU — CUDA vs CPU numerical divergence in a core linear algebra op. Domain relevance: log-determinant on CUDA uses cuSOLVER LU factorization; incorrect results for singular matrices indicate a kernel-level handling bug in the CUDA linalg backend.
